TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Kalibuan Itiniay i Xinyi Cen no Nantou ko Kalibuan a niyaro', 191 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 692 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 91% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 632 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 9% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 60 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 86%, Tayal 1%, Amis 2%, Cou 12%, Paiwan 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: kaɾib~b~vo~u~uan itiniaj i xinji ʦən no~u nanto~uo~u~u ko~u kaɾib~b~vo~u~uan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, tajaɾ *%, amis *%, ʦo~uo~u~u **%, paiwan *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Kalibuan Itiniay i Xinyi Cen no Nantou ko Kalibuan a niyaro', 191 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 692 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 91% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 632 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 9% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 60 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 86%, Tayal 1%, Amis 2%, Cou 12%, Paiwan 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: kaɾib~b~vo~u~uan itiniaj i xinji ʦən no~u nanto~uo~u~u ko~u kaɾib~b~vo~u~uan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, tajaɾ *%, amis *%, ʦo~uo~u~u **%, paiwan *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ.
